manifest.name: hud-reactions
manifest.author: DreamLayer Team
manifest.description: Throw 🎉 👏 ❤️ 🔥 onto your HUD, and everyone in your GhostMode circle sees it land too.
manifest.forwho: For friends, gigs, and anyone sharing a moment on the mesh.
long: Tap to react. A burst lands on your HUD, and if you're in a circle it lands on theirs. A silent yes across a room.
Only the tiny symbol crosses the mesh, signed and small. Never who you are, never where you're standing.
Made for concerts, watch parties, and inside jokes with the people next to you.
